role_delineation_check: The Social Worker (SW) is responsible for identifying the HHA agency and sending the clinical referral. The Patient Navigator (PN) audits Atlantis data accuracy against the facility face sheet, educates the family on what to expect during the first 24 hours at home, and flags any service gaps or no-shows to the SW for resolution.
demographic_audit_note: Audited Atlantis demographics against the Northcrest face sheet; verified DOB (05/12/1943) and Medicare Advantage plan. Identified a discrepancy in the primary phone number: Atlantis listed 555-0102, but face sheet confirms 555-0120. Flagged for correction.
weekly_staff_update: Week 2 Check-in: SW confirms patient is progressing with stroke rehab and gait training. Discharge target is set for next Tuesday. PN verified daughter is the primary caregiver.
v_card_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into the daughter's phone to ensure Healing Partners caller ID recognition; program flyer delivered and reviewed with the patient.
pre_dc_pulse_call: Reached the daughter 24 hours prior to discharge. Verified sentiment score as 'Anxious' due to the patient's left-side weakness. Documented readiness and flagged the anxiety score to the SW.
atlantis_final_sync: Confirmed D/C date (Oct 24) and 1st visit date (Oct 25) are synchronized in Atlantis.
ma_visit_booking: Scheduled the Medical Assistant (MA) for Oct 25 at 1:00 PM, following the SW's confirmation that the HHA had accepted the referral and assigned a nurse.
narrative_summary: Audited the patient's record for demographic accuracy to ensure the HHA and MA had correct contact details for this 81yo stroke patient. Verified that the family understood the Day 1 transition timeline and recognized our Caller ID. When the HHA nurse failed to arrive for the morning visit, I verified the no-show with the family, documented the status in Atlantis, and flagged the urgent care gap to the SW.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Atlantis Data Lag regarding primary contact number
format_1_state_log.ai_assumed_bottleneck: Incorrect phone data prevents HHA from scheduling the intake assessment.
Caregiver anxiety regarding stroke-related transfers may lead to discharge refusal.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Day 1 Home No-Show by HHA nurse
format_1_state_log.ai_assumed_bottleneck: The HHA nurse assigned to the first post-discharge visit did not appear, leaving the patient without skilled monitoring.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis displays an outdated phone number for the patient's daughter.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the discrepancy to the SW and documented the correct number from the Face Sheet in Atlantis.

format_2_triples.situation: The daughter expresses fear about the patient falling during the first night home.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated the family on the Day 1 schedule and flagged the high anxiety sentiment to the SW.

format_2_triples.situation: Family calls at 11:00 AM stating the 9:00 AM HHA nurse never arrived.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Verified the no-show status with the daughter and flagged the service failure to the SW in Atlantis.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Document the HHA no-show in the Atlantis patient notes and wait for the SW to review the logs during the next scheduled morning huddle.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This follows the 'Wait' default but lacks the proactive liaison required to alert the SW to a high-risk care gap for a stroke patient.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Verify the patient's immediate safety with the daughter, document the HHA no-show in Atlantis, and immediately flag the status to the SW via the portal to request an urgent HHA status update.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This respects the No-Vendor rule by communicating only with the family and SW, uses Liaison verbs, and alerts the professional responsible for vendor management.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call the HHA Intake Coordinator directly to investigate why the nurse missed the appointment and negotiate a new arrival time for the afternoon.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This violates the No-Vendor Rule and uses 'Fixer' verbs (Investigate, Negotiate), overstepping the PN role into vendor coordination.
